text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text: And now, the moment we've all been waiting for.

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
Our Umamusume of the Year! She's the brightest
star of the Twinkle Series...

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text:
A runner with unparalleled power and speed—and
the first sprinter in URA history to be selected...

text_block_list.name: Host A
text_block_list.text: Taiki Shuttle!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our first three years together have passed by,
just like that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As I think back on the precious—and rather
overwhelming—days we spent side by side...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdyyy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
You awake, Trainer? I know ya are! C'mon, let's
go!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! I haven't told ya yet! I'm throwin' a
special party!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
It's a surprise party to celebrate everything
you've done for me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Ya better believe this'll be a day to remember!
Now, I ain't gonna repeat myself again—let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her enthusiasm is intense, but she's gone out of
her way to prepare a party for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I resolve to accept whatever comes in good
stride, but...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Here we are! Surprise!
choice_data_list: Why are we at the racecourse?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Back in the US, my family barbecues right out in
the fields of our farm.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I want ya to know what that feels like, and I
reckon this is the closest thing to it!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And before ya get all in a tizzy, I already got the
go-ahead to do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should have known Taiki would have something
extravagant planned.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
There's usually somethin' going on here, but it's
quiet as a dormouse today.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Wide, open spaces like this just make me feel like
hollerin'! Yodel-ay-hee-hoo!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Now, let's get this party started! I'll be your
grill master for today!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although I have no issue with indulging in a
barbeque, I suspect all this meat may be an issue
for my stomach later.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Quit you're foolin', Trainer! You can't be full up
already. I brought dessert and everything...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. I guess when you're full, you're full. Let's
put down our forks for a minute, then.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I've got it! Seein' as how we're here and all, a
quick run couldn't hurt!
choice_data_list: Did you get permission for that too?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I'll get it later! I'm an Umamusume—ya can't
expect me to just stay put in front of a track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Taiki takes off running without another word.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Taiki Shuttle is a lot of things—she's animated,
energetic, and awe-inspiring.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And even more so on the track. I find myself more
and more captivated every time she runs.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Suddenly, I realize that she hasn't come back yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make my way to the track in search of Taiki
Shuttle...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Sob...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer... I'm so sorry...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Today was supposed to be all about you... I told
myself I wouldn't cry, and yet...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! I feel so lonely! I can't take it anymore!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Our three years together are over!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I wanna keep runnin' with ya! I wanna have more
parties with ya!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our third year almost over, she seems to be
feeling distraught over us going our separate
paths.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
But there's no reason the newly crowned
Umamusume of the Year and I have to part ways.
choice_data_list: You know, we're still going to be together...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whaddya mean? Don't we have to say goodbye
once our three years are up?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that such a thing only happens
when a pairing has failed to achieve satisfactory
results.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I don't believe this! I was dead certain that was
how it worked! Japanese sure is tricky!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So does that mean I get to keep runnin' with ya,
Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Yeehaaaw! I'm sooo happy!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Okay! Let's keep runnin' forever, just you and me!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: I'll never stop. I'll run for my family and my fans...

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
And I'll run for you too, Trainer! I promise to
always keep ya smiling!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for everything you've done for me! Let's
stick together from here on out!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'll keep running beside her and help her put on a
series of performances that no one will forget!
